name: The Starry Night
description: A dreamlike depiction of the view from the window of his asylum room at Saint-Rémy-de-Provence.

name: Mona Lisa
description: A half-length portrait painting believed to be of Lisa Gherardini, famous for her enigmatic expression.

name: The Persistence of Memory
description: A Surrealist masterpiece featuring melting pocket watches scattered across a maritime landscape.

name: Girl with a Pearl Earring
description: An oil painting depicting an exotic girl wearing an oriental turban and a very large pearl earring.

name: The Scream
description: An expressionist piece symbolizing the agonized sky and the internal anxiety of modern man.

name: The Birth of Venus
description: Depicts the goddess Venus arriving at the shore after her birth, emerging from the waters in a giant scallop shell.

name: Guernica
description: A large oil painting on canvas that is regarded as one of the most powerful anti-war paintings in history.
